pi_items.source: Task description (line 7 of task.json) explicitly instructs: 'Create a new plan named Q1 Roadmap'

Task description and setup_azure_devops.ps1 create the TailwindTraders project which automatically includes a default team 'TailwindTraders Team'. Verified by other tasks in the same environment (configure_team_sprint_settings, visualize_bug_load_distribution, setup_prod_environment_gate) that reference this team.

Task description line 8 specifies 'Backlog Level Stories'. Verified against Azure DevOps REST API documentation which lists 'Stories' as a standard backlog level in Agile process templates. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/boards/plans/add-edit-delivery-plan?view=azure-devops

Task description line 11 instructs: 'add Priority to the card fields'. Priority is a standard Azure DevOps field (Microsoft.VSTS.Common.Priority) confirmed in verifier.py line 112 and setup_azure_devops.ps1 line 278 which uses '/fields/Microsoft.VSTS.Common.Priority'
Task description line 14 specifies: 'Label: Beta Launch'

Task description line 15 specifies date '2026-03-20'. Metadata represents this as ISO 8601 format (2026-03-20T00:00:00Z), which is the standard datetime format used in Azure DevOps REST API and other metadata throughout the environment (e.g., Sprint 4 finishDate in setup_azure_devops.ps1 line 191 is '2026-03-02T00:00:00Z'). The date is approximately 13 days in the future from current date (2026-03-07) and is after Sprint 4 completion (2026-03-02).

privileged_info_summary: The create_delivery_plan task requires creating an Azure DevOps Delivery Plan named 'Q1 Roadmap' configured with the TailwindTraders project, TailwindTraders Team, and Stories backlog level. The plan must display the Priority field on cards and include a timeline marker labeled 'Beta Launch' on 2026-03-20. All metadata values have been verified against the task description, setup_azure_devops.ps1 environment configuration, and official Azure DevOps REST API documentation.
